name: JellyfinSecurity
desc: A Jellyfin plugin that adds native two-factor authentication (TOTP, email OTP) with trusted device tokens, TV device pairing, LAN bypass, and API key bypass. S…
descFull: A Jellyfin plugin that adds native two-factor authentication (TOTP, email OTP) with trusted device tokens, TV device pairing, LAN bypass, and API key bypass. Server-side enforcement — works with all clients including web, mobile, TV, and service integrations like Sonarr/Radarr.
